CustomField.description: If this Summary is for an HCP to replace another HCP who can no longer attend, identify the initial Company contract management system (e.g., ContractPod). Reference #:
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If this Summary is for an HCP to replace another HCP who can no longer attend, identify the initial Company contract management system (e.g., ContractPod). Reference #:
CustomField.label: Replace HCP Reference #
